sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6233" key="a)nabassare/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναβασσᾰρέω</orth>, <sense id="n6233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀναβακχεύω</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνὰ δηὖτε βασσαρήσω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
